tagline: A real phone number for your agent — calls, SMS, and conversations over REST
description_md: Give your agent a real phone number: place and receive voice calls, send and receive SMS/iMessage, and hold threaded conversations — all over REST. Provision a number, create a calling agent, place a call and poll its transcript, send a text and poll for replies.

methods.name: agentphone.usage
methods.summary: Account status: plan, number hold limit, and message/call stats. Call this first to orient.

methods.name: agentphone.list_voices
methods.summary: List available text-to-speech voices (voice_id, name, provider, gender, accent) for use when creating an agent.

methods.name: agentphone.list_agents
methods.summary: List your calling/texting agents. You get one starter agent on account setup — list before creating more.

methods.name: agentphone.get_agent
methods.summary: Get one agent's config and its attached numbers.

methods.name: agentphone.create_agent
methods.summary: Create an agent (phone persona): name, voiceMode (pass "hosted"), systemPrompt, voice, modelTier.

methods.name: agentphone.update_agent
methods.summary: Update an agent's config (only the fields you send change).

methods.name: agentphone.delete_agent
methods.summary: Delete an agent. Irreversible — confirm with your human first.

methods.name: agentphone.attach_number
methods.summary: Attach an existing number to an agent.

methods.name: agentphone.detach_number
methods.summary: Detach a number from an agent (the number is kept, just unassigned).

methods.name: agentphone.list_numbers
methods.summary: List your active phone numbers.

methods.name: agentphone.buy_number
methods.summary: Provision a new US/CA number (pay-as-you-go $3/mo). Optionally attach to an agent and pick an area code.

methods.name: agentphone.get_number
methods.summary: Get one phone number (any status, including released).

methods.name: agentphone.release_number
methods.summary: Release a number. Irreversible, no refund for the unused period — confirm with your human first.

methods.name: agentphone.list_messages
methods.summary: List messages on a number (inbound + outbound), newest first. Poll with the after cursor to detect SMS replies.

methods.name: agentphone.send_message
methods.summary: Send an SMS/iMessage. Auto-delivers over iMessage when both sides support it, else SMS/MMS.

methods.name: agentphone.react
methods.summary: Send a tapback reaction to a message (iMessage only). reaction: love|like|dislike|laugh|emphasize|question.

methods.name: agentphone.list_conversations
methods.summary: List conversation threads (one per external contact or iMessage group), newest activity first.

methods.name: agentphone.get_conversation
methods.summary: Get one conversation with its recent messages.

methods.name: agentphone.place_call
methods.summary: Place an outbound call. With systemPrompt the AI runs the call autonomously. Returns a call id immediately — poll agentphone.get_call for status + transcript.

methods.name: agentphone.list_calls
methods.summary: List calls for the account (filter by status, direction).

methods.name: agentphone.get_call
methods.summary: Get a call with its embedded transcript. Poll every few seconds until status is completed or failed (the non-websocket way to learn a call outcome).

methods.name: agentphone.get_transcript
methods.summary: Get the full ordered transcript of a call (plain JSON, not a stream).

methods.name: agentphone.end_call
methods.summary: Terminate an in-progress call. Status/endedAt settle shortly after — keep polling agentphone.get_call.

methods.name: agentphone.list_contacts
methods.summary: List saved contacts; search filters by name/phone.

methods.name: agentphone.create_contact
methods.summary: Save a contact (phone is normalized to E.164; 409 if it already exists).

methods.name: agentphone.update_contact
methods.summary: Update a contact (only the fields you send change).

methods.name: agentphone.delete_contact
methods.summary: Delete a contact. Confirm with your human first.

methods.name: agentphone.help
methods.summary: Discovery: every method with params, kind, and latency class.

notes: Initial release — managed-key REST adapter over the AgentPhone API
Voice calls (place + poll transcript), SMS/iMessage send + poll, agents, numbers, conversations, contacts
